requirement: The system shall ingest PDF documents automatically
acceptance_criteria: PDF files are parsed and indexed within 60 seconds

requirement: The system shall support DOCX document ingestion
acceptance_criteria: Word documents are parsed without formatting errors

requirement: The system shall provide a REST API for document upload
The system shall generate proposal sections automatically
acceptance_criteria: All 5 proposal sections are present in the response

requirement: The system shall support conversational Q&A
acceptance_criteria: Follow-up questions use prior conversation context

requirement: API response time for /ask shall be under 5 seconds
The system shall handle 50 concurrent users
All data in transit shall be encrypted (TLS 1.2+)
API keys shall not be exposed in logs
acceptance_criteria: Log audit confirms no key leakage

requirement: The system shall run via Docker Compose with a single command
The API shall provide Swagger documentation
